instructions: नीचे दिए गए Hindi sentences को English Imperative form में translate करें। Command, Request, Advice, Warning, Suggestion — सभी practice करें।

questions.explanation: Imperative sentence में subject 'you' छुपा होता है। सिर्फ verb से शुरू करते हैं।
Close/Shut दोनों सही हैं। Imperative = base verb से शुरू।
Kitchen command — base verb 'boil' से शुरू।
Clean = base verb। Imperative में article 'the' रहता है।
Phrasal verb 'switch off' या 'turn off' दोनों चलते हैं।
Switch on = turn on = put on — तीनों phrasal verbs सही हैं।
Cook, Prepare, Make — सभी खाना बनाने के लिए प्रयोग होते हैं।
Dishes = plates, bowls etc. Wash = धोना।
Cut या Chop दोनों सब्जी काटने के लिए सही हैं।
Tea के साथ 'make' सबसे common है। Brew = formal word।
'Do the laundry' एक idiomatic expression है।
Sweep = झाड़ू लगाना। Mop = पोछा लगाना।
TV के साथ 'turn off' सबसे natural है।
Heat या Warm दोनों गर्म करने के लिए।
'Add some' = थोड़ा डालो। 'Some' quantity को indicate करता है।
Bring = लाना (speaker की तरफ)। Fetch = जाकर लाना।
'Take out the trash' American English में बहुत common है।
'Make the bed' = बिस्तर की चादर ठीक करना — fixed expression।
'Before eating' = खाने से पहले। Gerund form।
AC = air conditioner। 'Turn on' = चालू करना।
'Toast the bread' या 'make some toast' दोनों सही।
Roast = भूनना (dry heat)। Fry = oil में।

questions.english: Wash your hands with warm water.
alternatives: Rinse your hands with warm water.
questions.hint: Wash + your hands + with + warm water
questions.explanation: 'With warm water' = गर्म पानी से। Prepositional phrase।
'Turn off the tap' = नल बंद करना।
Preheat = पहले से गर्म करना — baking instruction।

questions.english: Keep the vegetables in the refrigerator.
alternatives: Store the vegetables in the fridge.
questions.explanation: 'Store in the fridge' = फ्रिज में रखना।
Office command। Please लगाने से polite हो जाता है।
Schedule = तय करना। Set up = arrange करना।
'Keep in mind' = ध्यान में रखना — idiomatic।

questions.english: Come to the meeting on time.
alternatives: Be on time for the meeting.
questions.hint: Come + to + the meeting + on time

alternatives: Turn in the work on time.
Hand in the report by 5 PM.

questions.hindi: client की बात ध्यान से सुनो।

questions.explanation: 'Be quiet' = चुप रहो। Be + adjective form।
'Sit down' = phrasal verb। 'Take a seat' = polite form।
Carefully = ध्यान से। Adverb of manner।
Neatly = साफ और सुंदर तरीके से।
Road instruction। Turn right = दाईं तरफ मुड़ो।
Road instruction। Turn left = बाईं तरफ मुड़ो।

questions.hindi: फोन पर बात करते हुए गाड़ी मत चलाओ।
questions.english: Don't drive while talking on the phone.
alternatives: Do not use your phone while driving.

questions.english: Keep to the left side of the road.
alternatives: Walk on the left side of the road.

questions.hindi: बच्चों को सड़क पर अकेले मत छोड़ो।
questions.english: Don't leave children alone on the road.
alternatives: Do not leave kids unattended on the road.

questions.english: Wake up early in the morning.
questions.explanation: Wake up = उठना। 'In the morning' = time phrase।

questions.hindi: दिन में एक बार फल खाओ।

questions.explanation: Briskly = तेज़ और ऊर्जावान तरीके से।

questions.hindi: खाना खाने के बाद थोड़ा चलो।
alternatives: Take a short walk after meals.
Have water as soon as you wake up.
Include green vegetables in your diet.

questions.explanation: Polite request — 'Please' or 'Kindly' लगाने से polite होता है।

alternatives: Can I see the menu, please?

questions.english: Please bring a cup of coffee.
questions.hint: Please + bring + a cup of coffee

alternatives: Please tell me how much it costs.

questions.hindi: कृपया इस दस्तावेज़ पर हस्ताक्षर करें।

questions.explanation: 'Please hold on' = phone/reception में बोलते हैं।

alternatives: May I have your name, please?
Kindly reply at the earliest convenience.

questions.hindi: कृपया इस matter का ध्यान रखें।

alternatives: Please let us know your views.

questions.english: Please scan and send the document.
alternatives: Kindly scan and email the document.
Kindly go through the privacy policy.

questions.hindi: चलो किसी नई जगह जाते हैं।
चलो कोई नई skill सीखते हैं।
alternatives: Let's pick up a new skill.

questions.hindi: चलो किसी की मदद करते हैं।
alternatives: Let's lend a hand to someone.

questions.hindi: चलो शाम को जिम जाते हैं।
questions.english: Let's go to the gym in the evening.
alternatives: Let's hit the gym this evening.
questions.hint: Let's + go to + the gym + in the evening
questions.explanation: 'Hit the gym' = informal for going to gym।

questions.hindi: चलो एक नया business शुरू करते हैं।

alternatives: Let's come up with a solution.

questions.english: Let's take a walk in the park.
alternatives: Let's go for a walk in the park.
questions.hint: Let's + take a walk + in the park

questions.hindi: चलो एक नया language सीखते हैं।
alternatives: Let's start learning a new language.
Do not smoke in this area.

questions.explanation: 'Keep it down' = शोर कम करो — informal।

questions.hindi: गुस्से में कोई निर्णय मत लो।
कभी किसी को judge मत करो।
कभी किसी का दिल मत दुखाओ।

alternatives: Do not go out by yourself.

questions.hindi: रात को देर से मत आओ।
questions.english: Don't come home late at night.
alternatives: Do not stay out late at night.
questions.hint: Don't + come home + late + at night

questions.hindi: कभी किसी से झगड़ा मत करो।
कभी बुरी संगत में मत रहो।
पीठ पीछे किसी की बुराई मत करो।
questions.english: Never badmouth anyone behind their back.
alternatives: Don't talk badly about others behind their backs.

questions.hindi: कभी खुद को कम मत आँको।
इंटरनेट पर गलत जानकारी मत फैलाओ।
कभी किसी को धोखा मत दो।

questions.english: Write in your diary every day.
questions.hint: Write + in your diary + every day

alternatives: Try to learn something new daily.

questions.hindi: रोज़ कम से कम 30 मिनट पढ़ो।
questions.english: Read for at least 30 minutes every day.
alternatives: Study for at least half an hour daily.
questions.hint: Read + for + at least 30 minutes + every day

questions.hindi: हमेशा अपने बड़ों का सम्मान करो।
alternatives: Always show respect to your elders.

questions.hindi: रोज़ अपने goals की review करो।
हमेशा नई चीज़ें सीखने की कोशिश करो।
questions.english: Always try to learn new things.
questions.hint: Always + try to + learn + new things

questions.hindi: हमेशा अपने काम पर focus करो।

alternatives: Always try to do something kind every day.

questions.hindi: आग आने पर सीढ़ियाँ इस्तेमाल करें।
questions.english: Use the stairs in case of fire.
alternatives: In case of fire, use the stairs.
questions.hint: Use + the stairs + in case of fire

questions.english: Please send the report by 5 PM.
alternatives: Kindly submit the report by 5 PM.
questions.hint: Please + send + the report + by 5 PM

questions.hindi: कृपया इस document की समीक्षा करें।
कृपया meeting का agenda share करें।
बाईं तरफ मुड़ो, फिर सीधे चलो।
alternatives: Take a left turn, then continue straight.

questions.hindi: पुल पार करने से पहले रुको।
बच्चों को road पर खेलने मत दो।
questions.english: Don't let children play on the road.
alternatives: Keep children away from the road.
questions.hint: Don't + let + children + play + on the road

questions.hindi: रात में गाड़ी की headlights जलाओ।
questions.english: Keep the headlights on while driving at night.
alternatives: Turn on the headlights when driving at night.
questions.hint: Keep + headlights + on + while driving at night

questions.hindi: ज़ोर से बोलो ताकि सब सुन सकें।
questions.english: Speak loudly so everyone can hear.
alternatives: Talk louder so everyone can hear.
questions.hint: Speak loudly + so + everyone can hear

questions.hindi: अपनी आँखों से देखो, कान से सुनो।
questions.english: Look with your eyes and listen with your ears.
alternatives: Use your eyes to see and ears to listen.
questions.hint: Look + with your eyes + and + listen + with your ears

questions.hindi: गलत answer आने पर फिर से कोशिश करो।
questions.english: Try again if you get the wrong answer.
alternatives: If you get it wrong, try again.
questions.hint: Try again + if + you get the wrong answer

questions.hindi: पाँच मिनट में exercise पूरी करो।
questions.english: Complete the exercise in five minutes.
alternatives: Finish the exercise within five minutes.
questions.hint: Complete + the exercise + in five minutes

alternatives: Do not copy in the exam.

questions.hindi: paragraph पढ़कर सवालों के जवाब दो।
questions.english: Read the paragraph and answer the questions.
alternatives: Read the passage and answer the questions.
questions.hint: Read + the paragraph + and + answer the questions

alternatives: Decide your clothes the night before.

questions.english: Learn some new vocabulary every day.
alternatives: Add new words to your vocabulary daily.
Always keep your goals in mind.

questions.hindi: यहाँ मोबाइल का इस्तेमाल मना है।

alternatives: Warning: Slippery floor. Watch your step.

questions.english: Come to the office on time.
alternatives: Arrive at the office on time.
questions.hint: Come + to the office + on time

questions.hindi: सहकर्मियों के साथ मिलकर काम करो।
हर project की status track करो।
questions.english: Track the status of every project.
questions.hint: Track + the status + of every project

questions.english: Please sauté the onions in oil.
alternatives: Please fry the onions in oil.
questions.hint: Please + sauté + the onions + in oil

questions.english: Spend time with your family every day.
alternatives: Make time for your family daily.
questions.hint: Spend + time + with your family + every day

alternatives: Always be open to making new friends.

questions.hindi: अपनी बात स्पष्ट रूप से कहो।

alternatives: Hear the person out, then reply.
Dial in to the conference call.
Do a warm-up at the gym.

questions.hindi: data का backup cloud पर लो।
questions.english: Back up your data to the cloud.
alternatives: Save your data to the cloud.
questions.hint: Back up + your data + to the cloud

alternatives: Always give others a chance to speak.

questions.english: Write a gratitude journal every day.
questions.hint: Write + a gratitude journal + every day

questions.hindi: रोज़ अपने family को call करो।
यात्रा के दौरान सीट बेल्ट लगाएं।
questions.english: Fasten your seatbelt during the journey.
questions.hint: Fasten + your seatbelt + during the journey

questions.hindi: कृपया बाहर निकलने पर दरवाज़ा बंद करें।
questions.english: Please close the door when leaving.
alternatives: Kindly shut the door on your way out.
questions.hint: Please + close + the door + when leaving

alternatives: Always wash your hands before meals.
Rest for a while during work.

questions.english: Don't eat too much at night.
questions.hint: Don't + eat + too much + at night

questions.hindi: घर में first aid box रखो।
questions.english: Keep a first aid box at home.
alternatives: Maintain a first aid kit at home.
questions.hint: Keep + a first aid box + at home

questions.hindi: train आने पर platform पर पीछे हटो।
questions.english: Step back from the platform edge when the train arrives.
alternatives: Move away from the edge when the train comes.
questions.hint: Step back + from the platform + when the train arrives

questions.hindi: अनजान लोगों से कुछ मत लो।
flood आने पर ऊँची जगह जाओ।
questions.english: Move to higher ground during a flood.
alternatives: Go to higher ground if there is a flood.
questions.hint: Move + to higher ground + during a flood

questions.english: Don't stand under a tree during lightning.
questions.hint: Don't + stand + under a tree + during lightning

alternatives: Remain professional when dealing with clients.

questions.english: Maintain a positive attitude at the office.
questions.hint: Maintain + a positive attitude + at the office

alternatives: Note down points in every meeting.

questions.hindi: चलो कुछ नया plan करते हैं।
alternatives: Let's come up with something new.

questions.hindi: चलो साथ में project submit करते हैं।
alternatives: Let's hand in the project together.

questions.hindi: चलो weekend पर trip plan करते हैं।
alternatives: Let's go on a trip this weekend.

questions.hindi: चलो कोई नई book पढ़ते हैं।
alternatives: Let's pick up a new book.

questions.hindi: चलो team को celebrate करते हैं।
alternatives: Let's throw a party for the team.

questions.hindi: चलो एक volunteer program join करते हैं।

alternatives: Let's enroll in an online course.

questions.hindi: चलो environment के लिए कुछ करते हैं।
questions.english: Let's do something for the environment.
questions.hint: Let's + do + something + for the environment

questions.hindi: चलो एक दूसरे की मदद करते हैं।
alternatives: Let's lend each other a hand.

questions.hindi: हमेशा अपने काम पर गर्व करो।
questions.english: Always take pride in your work.
alternatives: Always be proud of your work.
questions.hint: Always + take pride + in your work
questions.grammarRule: Always + take pride in + your work

questions.english: Always think with an open mind.
questions.hint: Always + think + with an open mind

questions.hindi: रोज़ कुछ न कुछ donate करो।
alternatives: Give something back to society daily.

questions.english: Don't play music in the office.
alternatives: Do not play music at work.
questions.hint: Don't + play music + in the office

questions.hindi: बिना permission के files delete मत करो।
office के secrets किसी को मत बताओ।
questions.english: Don't share office secrets with anyone.
alternatives: Never disclose office information to outsiders.
questions.hint: Don't + share + office secrets + with anyone

questions.hindi: बिना proof के कुछ भी मत कहो।
दूसरों के काम में बाधा मत डालो।
alternatives: Never disturb others when they are working.
Read a story to the child.
Narrate a story to the child.
questions.explanation: Indirect object structure — Tell + person + thing।

questions.english: Leave your shoes at the door.
alternatives: Take off your shoes at the door.
questions.hint: Leave + your shoes + at the door

questions.english: Inform everyone when the plan changes.
alternatives: Notify the team if the plan changes.
questions.hint: Inform + everyone + when the plan changes

questions.hindi: रात को phone नीचे रख दो और सो जाओ।
questions.english: Put down your phone and go to sleep at night.
alternatives: Keep your phone aside and sleep at night.
questions.hint: Put down + phone + and + go to sleep + at night

questions.english: Never pay attention to negative comments.

questions.english: Don't take credit for others' work.
alternatives: Never claim credit for someone else's work.
questions.hint: Don't + take credit + for others' work

alternatives: Never cut someone off when they're speaking.

questions.english: Don't be late for the exam.
alternatives: Don't arrive late for the exam.
questions.hint: Don't + be late + for the exam

questions.hindi: किसी की बात को बढ़ा-चढ़ाकर मत बताओ।
alternatives: Never blow things out of proportion.

questions.english: Never share your password with anyone.
questions.hint: Never + share + your password + with anyone

alternatives: Don't be scared to say what you feel.

questions.hindi: exam से पहले अच्छी नींद लो।
questions.english: Get good sleep before the exam.
questions.hint: Get + good sleep + before the exam

questions.english: Drink a protein shake after working out.

questions.english: Rest if you have joint pain.
alternatives: If you have joint pain, take rest.
questions.hint: Rest + if you have + joint pain

alternatives: Conduct an orientation for the new employee.

questions.english: Let's listen to some motivating music.

चलो आज gym skip करते हैं।
alternatives: Let's take a rest day from the gym.

questions.hindi: चलो किसी ज़रूरतमंद की मदद करते हैं।
alternatives: Let's do something good for someone in need.

questions.english: Make the payment to the vendor.
questions.hint: Make + the payment + to the vendor

alternatives: Do your work from home today.

questions.english: Keep your camera on in the meeting.
alternatives: Turn on your camera during the meeting.
questions.hint: Keep + your camera + on + in the meeting

alternatives: Kindly stay quiet in the silent zone.

questions.english: Please take care of your children.

alternatives: Research the company before the interview.

questions.hindi: interviewer के सवालों को ध्यान से सुनो।
questions.english: Listen carefully to the interviewer's questions.
alternatives: Pay attention to the interviewer's questions.

alternatives: Keep eye contact during the interview.

questions.english: Ask yourself every day — did I learn something?
alternatives: Reflect on your learning every day.

questions.english: Spend 10 minutes in nature every day.
questions.hint: Spend + 10 minutes + in nature + every day

alternatives: Always stay true to your word.

questions.english: Ask questions during the interview too.
alternatives: Also ask your own questions during the interview.
questions.hint: Ask + questions + during the interview + too

questions.hindi: deadline से पहले काम पूरा करो।
questions.english: Finish the work before the deadline.
alternatives: Complete your work before the deadline.
questions.hint: Finish + the work + before the deadline

visitors को proper way में receive करो।

questions.english: Use a VPN on public Wi-Fi.
alternatives: Connect to a VPN when using public Wi-Fi.

questions.english: Ask again if you don't understand.

questions.hindi: सबके सामने अपनी answer present करो।
questions.english: Present your answer in front of everyone.
alternatives: Share your answer with the class.
questions.hint: Present + your answer + in front of everyone

questions.hindi: एक customer के रूप में politely complaint करो।
questions.english: Make a polite complaint as a customer.
alternatives: Lodge a polite complaint as a customer.

questions.hindi: food allergy के बारे में बताओ।
alternatives: Tell the server about your food allergy.

questions.hindi: चलो cooking class join करते हैं।
alternatives: Let's enroll in a cooking class.
Let's volunteer for a community cause.

questions.hindi: चलो बच्चों को कुछ सिखाते हैं।
alternatives: Let's share our knowledge with the children.

questions.hindi: इस issue को calmly handle करो।
अपनी बात को examples से समझाओ।
किसी की बात को interrupt मत करो।
questions.english: Don't interrupt when someone is speaking.
alternatives: Never cut in when someone is talking.
questions.hint: Don't + interrupt + when someone is speaking

questions.hindi: सब का मत सुनो, फिर अपना निर्णय लो।
questions.english: Listen to everyone, then make your decision.
questions.hint: Listen + to everyone + then + make your decision

questions.hindi: team meetings में actively participate करो।
हर task की priority set करो।
questions.english: Set the priority for every task.
questions.hint: Set + the priority + for every task

questions.hindi: feedback लेने में कभी संकोच मत करो।
questions.english: Never hesitate to ask for feedback.
alternatives: Don't be shy about asking for feedback.
questions.hint: Never + hesitate + to ask for feedback

questions.hindi: crisis में घबराओ मत, solution खोजो।
questions.english: Don't panic in a crisis, find a solution.
alternatives: In a crisis, stay calm and find a solution.

questions.hindi: हर दिन को बेहतर बनाने की कोशिश करो।
questions.english: Try to make every day better.
alternatives: Always strive to improve each day.
Make an effort to improve every day.
questions.hint: Try + to make + every day + better
